data.scene: User enables Health Connect sensors; the app reads authorized health data.
data.purpose: Sync health metrics to Home Assistant for health monitoring and automation.
data.source: Google Health Connect API (reads from device-local health database)
data.item: Heart rate, blood pressure (systolic/diastolic), blood glucose, sleep duration, weight, body temperature, SpO2, respiratory rate, calories, steps, and 25+ other health metrics
data.frequency: Per sensor update cycle (configurable, from minutes to tens of minutes)
data.storage: App does not persist locally; data is sent to Home Assistant server for storage
data.thirdparty: Data source is Google Health Connect; after reading, data is sent to the user's self-hosted Home Assistant server
data.switchpath: Settings -> Sensor Management -> Health Connect sensor group -> Enable/Disable individually

permissions.name: Health Connect read permissions (25+ types)
permissions.scene: When enabling Health Connect sensors in sensor settings
permissions.purpose: Read user health data (heart rate, blood pressure, blood glucose, etc.) from Health Connect
permissions.impact: If denied, the corresponding health sensors will not be able to retrieve data
